value_chain_position: Mobility and delivery marketplace platform — sits at the autonomous-vehicle/robotics consumer-interface layer, acting as the demand aggregator that any robo-taxi fleet (Waymo, Tesla FSD) must eventually route through or displace.
relative_comps: UBER's robotics_automation relevance is as the incumbent two-sided marketplace that AV deployments must either partner with or displace — Waymo already runs on the UBER platform. 18% YoY growth and 18% 3-year CAGR are solid for scale; FCF margin (18%) is improving. Vs LYFT, UBER has far superior geographic diversification and freight. The key disruption risk is that successful robo-taxi fleets could bypass UBER, capping its long-term load-bearing score. Defense_tech hint stripped as non-applicable.
